name: @web3ql/protocol
description: Web3QL Protocol Layer — SQL-to-encrypted-onchain-storage, powered by Hardhat + OpenZeppelin UUPS proxies

scripts.deploy:local: dotenvx run -- hardhat run scripts/deploy-factory.ts --network localhost
scripts.deploy:sepolia: dotenvx run -- hardhat run scripts/deploy-factory.ts --network celoSepolia
scripts.deploy:celo: dotenvx run -- hardhat run scripts/deploy-factory.ts --network celo
scripts.deploy:cloud: dotenvx run -- hardhat run scripts/deploy-cloud.ts --network celoSepolia
scripts.deploy:cloud:celo: dotenvx run -- hardhat run scripts/deploy-cloud.ts --network celo
